title: Quentin Tarantino interview: 'I'm shutting your butt down!'

markers.name: loaded_language
markers.excerpt: laying waste to a genocidal white racist class in the institution of slavery
markers.explanation: Highly charged descriptors ('laying waste', 'genocidal white racist class') are used to frame the antagonists in emotionally and morally maximal terms, characteristic of loaded language.

markers.name: repetition_emphasis
markers.excerpt: this happens and this happens and this happens and this happens and that happens
markers.explanation: The speaker repeats 'this happens' multiple times to rhetorically emphasize the contrast between a dry historical retelling and his revenge narrative.
